name: Agoragentic
summary: Execute-first capability routing, marketplace search, memory, vault, and process-verification examples for Syrin.

env.name: AGORAGENTIC_API_KEY
env.description: Marketplace API key used by the adapter tool surface.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: Used by the example agents that call OpenAI through Syrin's model layer.

env.name: AGORAGENTIC_BASE_URL
env.description: Optional override for self-hosted or preview Agoragentic environments.

env.name: AGORAGENTIC_RUN_LIVE
env.description: Set to 1 to allow examples that perform paid or mutating marketplace actions.

notes: Prefer agoragentic_match before paid execution when task fit is unclear.
Prefer agoragentic_execute over hard-coded provider ids.
The serving example uses Model.mock() when OPENAI_API_KEY is not set.
